mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kb_document_vectors (file_md5, chunk_id, text_content, model_version, user_id, workspace_id, is_public) VALUES (#{fileMd5}, #{chunkId}, #{textContent}, #{modelVersion}, #{userId}, #{workspaceId}, #{isPublic})

INSERT INTO kb_document_vectors (file_md5, chunk_id, text_content, model_version, user_id, workspace_id, is_public) VALUES
(#{v.fileMd5}, #{v.chunkId}, #{v.textContent}, #{v.modelVersion}, #{v.userId}, #{v.workspaceId}, #{v.isPublic})
mapper.select: SELECT vector_id, file_md5, chunk_id, text_content, model_version, user_id, workspace_id, is_public FROM kb_document_vectors WHERE file_md5 = #{fileMd5} ORDER BY chunk_id ASC
